history.subject: blueprint: drop false \leanok on thm:albanese_universal_property (decl is sorryAx-tainted)

Grassmannian representability (thm:grassmannian_representable): corrected the statement to the [Nitsure] hypotheses — V locally free of rank r, 1 ≤ d ≤ r (the old skeleton over an arbitrary sheaf of modules was not the cited theorem and not known to be true) — and proved it modulo two clean leaves. New GrassmannianRepresentability.lean: the trivialised case Grass(V,d) ≅ Grass(r,d) is representable by S ⨯ Gr(d,r) via the forget ⊣ star adjunction and the merged absolute chart construction (axiom-clean); the restriction comparison (Over.map j)^* Grass(V,d) ≅ Grass(j^*V, d) is proved from the pullback pseudofunctor coherences; the final theorem descends along a trivialising cover. Remaining typed-sorry leaves: Zariski descent of representability (EGA 0_I 4.5.4) and the Zariski sheaf axiom for the Grassmannian functor. Blueprint gains matching nodes with complete proofs.
blueprint: strip session-history line from Stacks 01XJ subsection intro (math-purity)
picrep T12: Zariski-descent keystone part 1 — small total functor GluedPoint/gluedFunctor with sect/ofSect equivalence to F-sections (sorry-free), toward representable_of_openCover via Stacks 01JJ

picrep T12: Zariski-descent keystone part 2 — gluedFunctor is a big-Zariski sheaf (isSheaf_gluedFunctor, sorry-free): opens-cover amalgamation via IsZariskiSheafOver + sieve reduction of arbitrary open-immersion covers
